mapper.sql: id, user_id, email, email_password_hash, email_verified, phone, phone_verified, github_id, google_id, microsoft_id, token_version, totp_enabled, totp_secret_encrypted, totp_confirmed_at, totp_enabled_at, totp_last_used_step, status, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM user_login_identity WHERE github_id = #{githubId} LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM user_login_identity WHERE email = #{email} LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM user_login_identity WHERE google_id = #{googleId} LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM user_login_identity WHERE microsoft_id = #{microsoftId} LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM user_login_identity WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM user_login_identity WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM user_login_identity WHERE phone = #{phone} AND phone_verified = TRUE LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_login_identity WHERE phone IS NOT NULL AND phone_verified = TRUE
SELECT phone FROM user_login_identity WHERE phone IS NOT NULL AND phone_verified = TRUE ORDER BY id LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE user_login_identity SET github_id = #{githubId}, last_login_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user_login_identity SET google_id = #{googleId}, last_login_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user_login_identity SET microsoft_id = #{microsoftId}, last_login_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user_login_identity SET last_login_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user_login_identity SET last_login_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE user_login_identity SET phone = #{phone}, phone_verified = TRUE, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId}

UPDATE user_login_identity SET totp_enabled = FALSE, totp_secret_encrypted = #{secretEncrypted}, totp_confirmed_at = NULL, totp_enabled_at = NULL, totp_last_used_step = NULL, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE user_login_identity SET totp_enabled = TRUE, totp_confirmed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, totp_enabled_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND totp_secret_encrypted IS NOT NULL
UPDATE user_login_identity SET totp_last_used_step = #{timeStep}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND (totp_last_used_step IS NULL OR totp_last_used_step < #{timeStep})

UPDATE user_login_identity SET totp_enabled = FALSE, totp_secret_encrypted = NULL, totp_confirmed_at = NULL, totp_enabled_at = NULL, totp_last_used_step = NULL, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
